headline: P&L exposure: ₹275 Cr direct penalty (from article) + ₹19.2 Cr indirect revenue loss (engine estimate)
what_matters: BRSR:Q12, GRI:207, ESRS G1 triggered; SEBI penalty deadline immediate; risk of further penalties if disclosure gaps persist.
P/E compression of 0.1x expected due to governance overhang; margin erosion of 49.0 bps; direct revenue at risk: ₹275 Cr (from article), indirect: ₹19.2 Cr (engine estimate).
Cost of capital likely to rise by 20-40 bps due to regulatory penalty and credit rating downgrade (BRSR, S&P Global ESG).
